# Blueprinter

> AI-first web data extraction platform for e-commerce intelligence. Blueprinter automates how companies gather data from the web by integrating multiple online sources into unified, structured pipelines.

Blueprinter helps e-commerce teams and brands turn raw web signals into action. The platform monitors marketplaces, retailer sites, and other public sources in real time, then normalises the data into structured pipelines.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://blueprinter.io/): Product overview, features for e-commerce teams and brands, FAQ, and contact.
- [App login](https://app.blueprinter.io): Authenticated product surface for existing customers.

## What Blueprinter does for e-commerce teams

- **Competitive landscape** — Monitor pricing, positioning, and promotions across marketplaces in real time.
- **Advertising & sales** — Track ad placements, sponsored listings, and sales performance.
- **Sentiment analysis** — Aggregate reviews and ratings across channels and address negative sentiment before it escalates.
- **Inventory monitoring** — Get alerts when stock levels drop or competitors run out of supply.

## What Blueprinter does for brands

- **Product positioning** — Verify titles, images, and descriptions across retailers and marketplaces at scale.
- **Brand protection** — Detect counterfeits, unauthorised sellers, and MAP violations.
- **Customer behaviour** — Understand how shoppers interact with products through review analysis and search trends.
- **Dynamic pricing** — Track competitor price changes in real time and adjust positioning to maximise margins.

## Contact

Book a meeting via the link on https://blueprinter.io or sign in at https://app.blueprinter.io.
